summary: Comprehensive testing completed for MTH Hospital Operations System new core modules. All 6 new modules tested successfully: Return Order Workflow, Billing Engine, Admin Reports Framework, Patient Workflow, Pre-Admission Process, and Asset Maintenance. Backend APIs achieving 100% success rate (29/29 tests). Frontend integration working excellently with Return Orders and Admin Reports fully functional.

resolved_issues.issue: Missing SQLAlchemy relationship between Billing and Order models causing 500 errors
resolved_issues.resolution: Added relationship mappings in models.py - Billing.order and Order.billing relationships

ui_bugs.issue: Orders, Billing, Pending tabs not easily clickable on mobile view - users may need to scroll or access via Dashboard tab
ui_bugs.workaround: Dashboard tab provides comprehensive view of all report data

Billing Engine API endpoints (list billing, summary stats)
